text:
Parrot Candy ウグイスキャンディー - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. This candy, when eaten, will let the player mimic any voice of their choice perfectly.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Parrot Candy ウグイスキャンディー - This card grants the caster some Parrot Candy. This candy allows for whoever consumes it, to perfectly mimic any voice they can think of. This is very useful when impersonating another player. The effects last until the next time something is eaten. The card provides 10 packs of this item. Each pack containing 50 candies each.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"

|No.032 - ウグイスキャンディ 
この飴をなめると、次に何かを飲食するまでの間、どんな声でも自在に出すことが出来るようになる。１袋50粒入り、10袋セット。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.032 - Parrot Candy 
It is possible to eat the candy and, until consuming anything, freely speak in any voice. 50 Tablets 1 bag, 10 bags set.
|}
